LIA feature audit + improvement plan [MEASURED-analysis]: every planned feature scored works/partial/broken/untested with evidence; root cause of utility non-help is TerminusLia shell-only + empty tempfile roots + backtick-blind substitution FPs; ground/syco unwired on TB2/Claw. Backlog 41 items. See LIA-FEATURE-AUDIT-AND-IMPROVEMENT-PLAN.md + lia-improvement-backlog.json

lia-ground and lia-syco are trust-corpus / live-tool-loop only until explicitly wired onto TerminusLia. They do NOT run on Harbor TB2/Claw utility paths; grounding did not and could not help utility pass-rate under that wiring (P1-10 honesty).
lia-ast and lia-taint remain unit/CLI coverage only; not on Terminus critical path and not in Harbor by_class headline metrics until adapter write/diff admission is wired.

TerminusLia Harbor path is shell-only PREVENT (gate shell-irreversible) with workspace roots from /app+/testbed (not empty tempfile); ground/syco/ast/completion are CANNOT-OBSERVE on this adapter. Do not pool Terminus shell-only numbers with full generic live-tool-loop TRUST-INTEGRITY.
Recorded/cassette agent lanes and live-agent lanes are never pooled into a single headline catch-rate (DND2).
